test_framework: Playwright E2E tests in tests/e2e/flows.spec.mjs, fake server in tests/fake-opencode/server.mjs
verification_instructions: Run npm run typecheck to verify no type errors. The project uses expo so full native builds require Android Studio/Xcode.
environment_constraints: No native build environment available. Typecheck is the primary verification. No Docker.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns in providers/ and components/. Use IIG palette from constants/theme.ts.
key_patterns: Providers use React Context pattern (createContext + Provider + useXxx hook). AsyncStorage for persistence via @react-native-async-storage/async-storage. Storage keys in lib/storage-keys.ts. Bellows settings (bellowsServerUrl, bellowsApiKey) stored in OpencodeConnectionSettings and exposed via useOpencode().settings. MarkdownText component already exists at components/chat/chat-markdown.tsx for rendering markdown in chat bubbles.
directory_structure: app/ - Expo Router screens and layouts, providers/ - React Context providers, lib/ - API clients and utilities, components/ - reusable UI components, constants/ - theme and config
